content.en:
Since Ye Tian was refining the immeasurable blood limit to improve the quality of immeasurable blood, he needed to consume a lot of immeasurable blood.

As time passed, the amount of immeasurable blood on the eighth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower decreased at a rate visible to the naked eye.

If those high-level immeasurable lifeforms entered the eighth layer later, it was estimated that they would not be able to enjoy the benefits of immeasurable blood.

Of course, high-level immeasurable lifeforms like the Star Sea Great Ancestor and the Raccoon Blood Great Ancestor who had already condensed 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood did not need to condense immeasurable blood themselves.

Even if they entered the eighth layer, they would only use the immeasurable blood here to refine their own immeasurable blood, so that the quality of the immeasurable blood would be slightly higher, which would not help their strength much.

In fact, the eighth layer is also attractive to high-level immeasurable lifeforms that have not yet completely condensed the immeasurable blood.

Another period of time has passed, and at this time, Ye Tian has already condensed 10,000 drops of immeasurable blood, and it is still the limit of refining, and the quality has been improved to the limit.

According to the division of the Genki realm, the quality of immeasurable blood can be divided into inferior, medium, and upper class.

In general, the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage had only the same immeasurable blood quality as inferior, while Ye Tian's immeasurable blood was superior.

Of course.

If he didn't have enough Void Golden Water, Ye Tian wouldn't be able to quench 10,000 drops of immeasurable blood to the upper limit now.

"It's a pity that there isn't enough Void Golden Water!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Without the Void Golden Water, he would not be able to quickly refine the immeasurable blood, so no matter how much immeasurable blood he condensed, it would not make much sense.

After all, what he pursued was extreme refinement, not blindly pursuing the amount of immeasurable blood.

"Forget it, the immeasurable blood can be condensed to 129,600 drops sooner or later, let's go to the ninth layer first!"

Ye Tian decided.

There are no requirements for the eighth layer to enter the ninth floor, and he can enter the ninth layer at any time.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body left from the eighth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower and came to the ninth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower.

......

The ninth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower.

Ye Tian came here and saw a purple light bordering a red light in the void, showing a special state.

Ye Tian looked at it for a while and saw a clue.

The purple light represents the rules of the Divine Armor Realm, while the red light represents the rules of the Xuanqi Realm, which is the area where the Xuanqi Realm and the Divine Armor Realm meet.

Since the Relic Stone Pagoda runs through the Xuanqi Realm and the Divine Armor Realm, the Relic Stone Pagoda also withstands the pressure from the two realms, resulting in its own origin being unable to be completely concealed.

If you can pass through the place where the purple light meets the red light, you may be able to reach the origin of the ruin stone tower.

When the time comes, only a part of the origin needs to be refined, and you can take charge of the ruin stone tower and occupy this ruin.

Ye Tian naturally has a little interest in occupying the ruin stone tower, if he occupies such a ruin stone tower, although he will become the target of public criticism, he will get more benefits.

Swish!

Ye Tian rushed to the place where the red light and the purple light met, and as soon as he entered this area, he felt a huge pressure.

At this moment, it was as if the pressure of the two worlds was not only acting on the ruin stone tower, but also on him.

"Sure enough, it's not so easy to refine the ruin stone tower, even if you enter the ninth layer, but without strong strength, you still can't refine the ruin stone tower!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he is still quite confident in his own strength.

Originally, his strength was very strong, and he refined so much immeasurable blood in the eighth layer, making himself condense 10,000 drops of immeasurable blood, and all of them were tempered to the limit, becoming a high-grade limit immeasurable blood.

As a result, his strength was greatly improved on the eighth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

Now, he thought that his strength would surpass the Xinghai Great Ancestor and them, so he thought that he was the Great Ancestor who was most likely to obtain the Ruined Stone Tower.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian walked step by step to the depths of the area where the red and purple light intersected, and his body shook the pressure in the dark.

At the beginning, he didn't even fully urge Taihao's immeasurable body, but when he got to the back, he had to open it, and even the immeasurable extreme dao domain was compressed around his body to the limit, bearing the pressure around him.

At this time, the suppression here was enough to cause the flesh of some powerful third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms to shatter and turn into powder.

Ye Tian kept walking, and he didn't know where the origin of the ruins stone tower was.

Time passed slowly, and just when Ye Tiandu was about to lose it, he finally sensed the aura of the origin of the ruins stone tower.

"I finally sensed it, although there is still some distance, but be careful, pass slowly, you should be able to hold on!" Ye Tian muttered.

......

The eighth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

With the help of their own forces, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea and the Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang finally created an Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, although it was an extremely weak Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, but it also met the requirements.

Immediately, they entered the eighth floor of the ruins stone tower one by one, and the time was almost the same.

"That mysterious Great Ancestor is not on the eighth layer!"

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor frowned.

Although the immeasurable blood on the eighth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower helped him refine his immeasurable blood and improve the quality of immeasurable blood a little, it was of little significance overall.

It is almost unrealistic to want to refine and improve all the immeasurable blood in the whole body here.

"Go straight to the ninth floor!"

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor decided.

The force he was in had paid an unimaginable price to help him, and finally let him enter the eighth layer, but he didn't come here to cultivate.

He had only one purpose, and that was to capture the Relic Stone Tower.

Now that Ye Tian had gone to the ninth layer, he naturally couldn't stay on the eighth layer anymore.

Thereupon.

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor went directly to the ninth layer, and the Xinghai Great Ancestor who came later did not hesitate at all, and also went directly to the ninth layer.

In a short time, the ninth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower gathered seven or eight high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

They not only represent themselves, but also represent the top powers.

"Damn, this mysterious Great Ancestor is already trying to get close to the origin of the Ruined Stone Tower!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor said angrily.

One by one, the Great Ancestors had already rushed to the area where the red light and the purple light were intersecting, and they were chasing Ye Tian one by one, but they were also under great pressure, and they had to go all out to be able to withstand it.

And Xinghai Great Ancestor was also extremely confident in his strength, but it didn't take long for his face to change.

Because he was about to lose his bearing, so did several other high-level immeasurable lifeforms, only the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor could continue to hold on, and he was still walking deeper.

"It's impossible, I'm not as good as the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor, how can it be that I am not as good as the Great Ancestor who has only been a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform for a long time?"

Xinghai Great Ancestor said secretly.

Immediately, he found a reason for himself: "That mysterious ancestor must have failed and left the ruins stone tower directly!!!"

However, he knew very well that if Ye Tian left the Ruins Stone Tower, the top forces would definitely know about it a long time ago, and he would also receive information.

But now, I didn't see Ye Tian leave at all, proving that Ye Tian was still here.

Therefore, his thoughts can only comfort himself.

"No, I have to find Xuanxin Great Ancestor and them for help, at least let me withstand the pressure here!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor thought.

He, there is still hope, and he can't give up yet.
